message:
Fix bugs found during code review

- Fix integer division precision loss in usage benchmarks
  (10000/60 → 10000.0/60.0 for TokensPerMinute)
- Fix misleading comment about --no-fetch flag in monitor tests
- Strengthen JSON parsing assertion in monitor JSON test
- Add gemini provider support to createTestProfile helper

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
